greetings: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?
Hey! Welcome. What do you need?

hello: Hi! How are you doing today?
Hello there! Nice to meet you!
how are you: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! How about you?
I'm fine! Ready to help you.
help: Sure! I can help with information, answer questions, or have a chat. What do you need?
thank you: My pleasure! Let me know if you need anything else.
what's your name: I'm an AI Chatbot! Nice to meet you.
name: I'm Chatbot, your virtual assistant!
who are you: I'm a chatbot designed to assist you with information and conversation.
weather: I don't have access to real-time weather data, but you can check a weather website for that!
time: I don't have access to the current time, but you can check your system clock!
joke: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
funny: Here's a funny fact: Honey never spoils! It can last for thousands of years.
Did you know? A group of flamingos is called a 'flamboyance'!
bye: Goodbye! Hope to chat with you again soon!
See you later! Have a great day!
goodbye: Goodbye! It was nice talking to you!

default: I'm not sure I understood that. Could you rephrase?
I don't have a specific response for that, but I'm here to help!
Could you ask that in a different way?
